data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh

- [ ] CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md does not contain an issue_tracker.create_cmd section
  Verify: ! grep -q 'issue_tracker.create_cmd' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md

- [ ] CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md does not contain a CREATE_CMD env var override section
  Verify: ! grep -q '^### CREATE_CMD' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md

- [ ] CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md still contains issue_tracker.search_cmd section
  Verify: grep -q 'issue_tracker.search_cmd' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md

- [ ] CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md still contains SEARCH_CMD section
  Verify: grep -q '### SEARCH_CMD' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md

- [ ] ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
